projectDescription: A collection of production-ready deep learning microservices — Credit Scoring (MLP), X-Ray Evaluation (CNN + GradCAM), and Smart Checkout (YOLO + WebSockets) — each dockerized and deployable to Google Cloud Run.
keyFeatures: Credit risk prediction via MLP neural network with PyTorch and FastAPI REST endpoint
Chest X-ray classification using YOLOv11-cls CNN with GradCAM explainability heatmaps
Real-time multi-object detection via WebSocket streaming with YOLO26 and GPU inference
All services fully dockerized with optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles for Google Cloud Run
Automated CI/CD pipeline via Google Cloud Build with Artifact Registry and Cloud Run deployment
Pydantic schema validation for strict type-safe API contracts across all services
publicApiSurface: POST /cnn_xray_demo — X-ray classification + GradCAM heatmap (Base64 in/out)
GET /health — Service health check (X-Ray and Smart Checkout services)
WebSocket /ws/smart_checkout — Real-time object detection stream (binary frame protocol)
